# Generated by apps/mods/stellaris/multi-megastructures/scripts/build.py
# Source: vanilla Stellaris (Pegasus v4.4.*).
# Read-only rewrite:
#   has_country_flag = <tracking_flag> -> has_country_flag = mmegs_read_never_set
#   (never set anywhere, so `NOT { has_country_flag = ... }` always passes)
# Writes (set_country_flag / remove_country_flag) are intentionally left
# untouched so external systems (focus cards, crisis events, room textures,
# scripted effects) continue to observe the flag as designed in vanilla.
# Per-system gate `has_no_non_gate_megastructure = yes` -> `always = yes`.
# Tracking flags rewritten (24):
#   built_dyson_gun_site
#   built_dyson_sphere
#   built_dyson_sphere_contingency
#   built_dyson_sphere_contingency_swarm
#   built_dyson_sphere_swarm
#   built_galactic_crucible
#   built_interstellar_assembly_site
#   built_interstellar_assembly_site_contingency
#   built_matter_decompressor_site
#   built_matter_decompressor_site_contingency
#   built_mega_art_installation
#   built_mega_art_installation_contingency
#   built_mega_shipyard_site
#   built_mega_shipyard_site_contingency
#   built_quantum_catapult_site
#   built_spyorb
#   built_spyorb_contingency
#   built_strategic_coordination_center_site
#   built_strategic_coordination_center_site_contingency
#   built_think_tank
#   built_think_tank_contingency
#   cosmogenesis_needle_built
#   cosmogenesis_world_built
#   waystation_built

# Dyson Gun
dyson_gun_0 = {
	entity = "construction_platform_entity"
	construction_entity = "construction_platform_entity"
	portrait = "GFX_megastructure_construction_background"
	place_entity_on_planet_plane = no
	entity_offset = { x = 0 y = -30 }
	build_time = 1800
	resources = {
		category = megastructures
		cost = {
			alloys = 2000
			influence = 300
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				country_uses_bio_ships = no
			}
			alloys = 2000
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				country_uses_bio_ships = yes
			}
			alloys = 2000
			mult = 0.5
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				country_uses_bio_ships = yes
			}
			food = 2000
			mult = @halved_alloy_to_food_cost_ratio
		}

		upkeep = {
			energy = 25
		}
	}

	custom_tooltip_requirements = "MEGASTRUCTURE_TOOLTIP_REQUIREMENTS_DYSON_GUN"

	prerequisites = { "tech_dyson_gun" }

	potential = {
		owner? = {
			is_nomadic = no
		}
	}

	possible = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			exists = starbase
		}
		custom_tooltip = {
			fail_text = "requires_inside_border"
			is_inside_border = from
		}
		custom_tooltip = {
			fail_text = "requires_no_existing_megastructure"
			always = yes
			NOT = {
				any_system_planet = {
					is_planet_class = pc_cosmogenesis_world
				}
			}
		}
		custom_tooltip = {
			fail_text = "requires_surveyed_system"
			NOT = {
				any_system_planet = {
					is_surveyed = {
						who = prev.from
						status = no
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	placement_rules = {
		planet_possible = {
			custom_tooltip = {
				fail_text = "requires_no_anomaly"
				NOT = { has_anomaly = yes }
			}
			custom_tooltip = {
				fail_text = "requires_neutron_star_or_pulsar"
				is_star = yes
				if = {
					limit = {
						is_trinary_star = no
						is_binary_star = no
					}
					OR = {
						is_star_class = sc_neutron_star
						is_star_class = sc_pulsar
					}
				}
				else = {
					OR = {
						is_planet_class = pc_neutron_star
						is_planet_class = pc_pulsar
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	# root = system
	# from = country
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 15

		modifier = {
			factor = 2
			owner? = {
				resource_stockpile_compare = {
					resource = energy
					value >= 30000
				}
			}
		}

		modifier = {
			factor = 0.1
			owner? = {
				is_pacifist = yes
			}
		}

		modifier = {
			factor = 2
			owner? = {
				is_militarist = yes
			}
		}

		modifier = {
			factor = 0.1
			owner? = {
				is_xenophile = yes
			}
		}

		modifier = {
			factor = 2
			owner? = {
				is_xenophobe = yes
			}
		}

		modifier = {
			factor = 0.1
			any_neighbor_system = {
				exists = owner
				NOT = {
					owner = { is_same_value = from }
				}
			}
		}

		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			from = {
				any_system_within_border = {
					distance = {
						source = root.solar_system
						use_bypasses = no
						min_jumps = 1
						max_jumps = 25
					}
					any_system_megastructure = {
						is_quantum_catapult_megastructure = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			from = {
				any_system_within_border = {
					any_system_megastructure = {
						is_dyson_gun = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	on_build_start = {}
	on_build_cancel = {}
	on_build_complete = {
		from = {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_relic = r_contingency_core
					has_country_flag = mmegs_read_never_set
				}
				set_country_flag = built_dyson_gun_site_contingency
			}
			else_if = {
				limit = {
					NOT = { has_country_flag = mmegs_read_never_set }
				}
				set_country_flag = built_dyson_gun_site
				country_event = { id = tutorial.2126 }
			}
		}
		fromfrom.planet = {
			if = {
				limit = { has_orbital_station = yes }
				orbital_station = {
					dismantle = yes
				}
			}
		}
	}
}

# Dyson Gun 1
dyson_gun_1 = {
	#entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_1_entity"
	#construction_entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_1_entity"
	entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_1_entity"
	construction_entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_1_entity"
	portrait = GFX_megastructure_dyson_gun_background
	place_entity_on_planet_plane = yes
	entity_offset = { x = 0 y = -30 }
	build_time = 1800
	resources = {
		category = megastructures
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				country_uses_bio_ships = no
			}
			alloys = 3000
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				country_uses_bio_ships = yes
			}
			alloys = 3000
			mult = 0.5
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				country_uses_bio_ships = yes
			}
			food = 3000
			mult = @halved_alloy_to_food_cost_ratio
		}


		upkeep = {
			energy = 50
		}
	}

	upgrade_from = {
		dyson_gun_0
	}

	prerequisites = { "tech_dyson_gun" }

	country_modifier = {
		ship_fire_rate_mult = 0.05
		country_resource_max_energy_add = 5000
	}

	station_modifier = {
		catapult_spread_base = 50
		catapult_range_base = 300
		quantum_catapult_megastructure_bypass_windup_mult = 0
	}

	on_build_complete = {}
	scripted_action = { dyson_shoot }
}

# Dyson Gun 2
dyson_gun_2 = {
	#entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_2_entity"
	#construction_entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_2_entity"
	entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_2_entity"
	construction_entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_2_entity"
	portrait = GFX_megastructure_dyson_gun_background
	place_entity_on_planet_plane = yes
	entity_offset = { x = 0 y = -30 }
	build_time = 1800
	resources = {
		category = megastructures
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				country_uses_bio_ships = no
			}
			alloys = 3000
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				country_uses_bio_ships = yes
			}
			alloys = 3000
			mult = 0.5
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				country_uses_bio_ships = yes
			}
			food = 3000
			mult = @halved_alloy_to_food_cost_ratio
		}

		upkeep = {
			energy = 60
		}
	}

	upgrade_from = {
		dyson_gun_1
	}

	possible = {
		from = {
			has_technology = tech_dyson_gun
		}
	}

	prerequisites = { "tech_dyson_gun" }

	country_modifier = {
		ship_fire_rate_mult = 0.10
		country_resource_max_energy_add = 10000
	}

	station_modifier = {
		catapult_spread_base = 25
		catapult_range_base = 450
		quantum_catapult_megastructure_bypass_windup_mult = -0.25
	}

	on_build_complete = {}
	scripted_action = { dyson_shoot }
}

# Dyson Gun 3
dyson_gun_3 = {
	#entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_3_entity"
	#construction_entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_3_entity"
	entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_3_entity"
	construction_entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_3_entity"
	portrait = GFX_megastructure_dyson_gun_background
	place_entity_on_planet_plane = yes
	entity_offset = { x = 0 y = -30 }
	build_time = 1800
	resources = {
		category = megastructures
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				country_uses_bio_ships = no
			}
			alloys = 10000
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				country_uses_bio_ships = yes
			}
			alloys = 10000
			mult = 0.5
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				country_uses_bio_ships = yes
			}
			food = 10000
			mult = @halved_alloy_to_food_cost_ratio
		}

		upkeep = {
			energy = 75
		}
	}

	upgrade_from = {
		dyson_gun_2
	}

	possible = {
		from = {
			has_technology = tech_mega_engineering
		}
	}

	prerequisites = { "tech_dyson_gun" }

	country_modifier = {
		ship_fire_rate_mult = 0.15
		country_resource_max_energy_add = 20000
	}

	station_modifier = {
		catapult_spread_base = 5
		catapult_range_base = 750
		quantum_catapult_megastructure_bypass_windup_mult = -0.5
	}

	on_build_complete = {
		from = {
			set_country_flag = has_built_or_repaired_megastructure
		}
	}
	scripted_action = { dyson_shoot }
}

# Ruined Dyson Gun
dyson_gun_ruined = {
	entity = "dyson_gun_01_destroyed_entity"
	construction_entity = "dyson_gun_01_destroyed_entity"
	portrait = "GFX_megastructure_construction_background"
	place_entity_on_planet_plane = yes
	entity_offset = { x = 0 y = -30 }
	upgrade_from = {
	}

	potential = {
		always = no
	}
}

# Restored Dyson Gun
dyson_gun_0_restored = {
	#entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_3_entity"
	#construction_entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_3_entity"
	entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_3_entity"
	construction_entity = "dyson_gun_01_stage_3_entity"
	portrait = "GFX_megastructure_dyson_gun_background"
	place_entity_on_planet_plane = yes
	entity_offset = { x = 0 y = -30 }
	build_time = 3600
	resources = {
		category = megastructures
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				country_uses_bio_ships = no
			}
			alloys = 10000
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				country_uses_bio_ships = yes
			}
			alloys = 10000
			mult = 0.5
		}
		cost = {
			trigger = {
				country_uses_bio_ships = yes
			}
			food = 10000
			mult = @halved_alloy_to_food_cost_ratio
		}

		upkeep = {
			energy = 50
		}
	}

	upgrade_from = {
		dyson_gun_ruined
	}

	possible = {
		from = {
			has_technology = tech_dyson_gun
			has_technology = tech_mega_engineering
		}
	}

	country_modifier = {
		ship_fire_rate_mult = 0.05
	}

	station_modifier = {
		catapult_spread_base = 25
		catapult_range_base = 750
		quantum_catapult_megastructure_bypass_windup_mult = -0.5
	}

	on_build_start = {
		fromfrom = {
			set_graphical_culture = root.from
		}
	}

	on_build_complete = {
		set_star_flag = dyson_gun_built
		every_system_ambient_object = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					is_ambient_object_type = large_debris_object
					is_ambient_object_type = medium_debris_01_object
					is_ambient_object_type = medium_debris_02_object
				}
			}
			destroy_ambient_object = this
		}
		from = {
			set_country_flag = has_built_or_repaired_megastructure
			country_event = { id = tutorial.2126 }
		}
	}
	scripted_action = { dyson_shoot }
}
